source_description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.

SOC2_TSC.rationale: Both controls address restriction of privileged access; SOC 2 CC6.1 covers logical access controls including privileged user management.

NIST_CSF_2.control_title: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware are managed by the organization
NIST_CSF_2.rationale: NIST CSF 2.0 PR.AA-01 directly addresses identity and credential management including privileged accounts.

ISO_42001_2023.rationale: ISO 42001 A.6.2.3 extends access control requirements to AI systems; privileged access to AI model training pipelines falls under this control.
